encrypted_at_rest.source_quote: Based on training knowledge — sensitive data encrypted at rest

honors_gpc.source_quote: Based on training knowledge — Uber does not honor Global Privacy Control

label_notes: Source: training knowledge. Uber collects extensive real-time location and trip data. Privacy practices centered on service delivery, fraud prevention, and optimization. The company does not sell personal data but shares extensively with drivers, partners, and service providers. Location tracking is integral to service operation. Updated with available information as of knowledge cutoff Feb 2025.
